ast-grep.description: AST semantic code search for Repo Map generation

playwright.description: Browser automation - page interaction, snapshots, form filling

_comments.usage: Copy the servers you need to your ~/.claude.json mcpServers section
_comments.env_vars: Replace YOUR_*_HERE placeholders with actual values
_comments.context_warning: Keep under 10 MCPs enabled to preserve context window
_comments.removed_servers: brave-search, supabase removed (not core dev-assistant MCPs)
_comments.auto_core_note: auto-core PHASE 1 scans this file to discover available MCP capabilities.
